chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-945 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection at flag-A 2. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2025 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3 which is taken on record. He also files compliance report on behalf of respondent No.3 which is also taken on record. Copy thereof supplied to counsel for the petitioner. Counsel for respondent No.3 states that amount of Rs. 1,88,785/-(one lac eighty eight thousands, seven hundred eighty five), is only remains to be paid to the petitioner and same will be paid to him in next month and requests for issuance directions to the petitioner to collect the said amount from the office of Municipal Committee Khairpur up to 10th date of October. On which learned counsel for petitioner shows satisfaction and seeks disposal of instant petition. Under these circumstances, instant petitions is disposed of with directions to the respondent No.3 to pay the remaining amount stated as above to the petitioner within one month and in case of failure the contempt proceeding shall be initiated against him. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
